_publications._publicationTitle: Development of 3D culture models of plexiform neurofibroma and initial application for phenotypic characterization and drug screening
_publications._context: Developed 3D reconstituted basement membrane overlay culture using immortalized NF1 plexiform neurofibroma cell lines for phenotypic characterization and drug screening

_publications._publicationTitle: A Fibroblast-Derived Secretome Stimulates the Growth and Invasiveness of 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Spheroids
_publications._context: Used 3D rBM overlay model according to previous publications for live-cell imaging by confocal microscopy

_publications._publicationTitle: Fibroblasts Attenuate Anti-Tumor Drug Efficacy in Tumor Cells via Paracrine Interactions with Tumor Cells in 3D Plexiform Neurofibroma Cultures
_publications._context: Used 3D plexiform neurofibroma spheroids alongside TAME microfluidic chips to assess fibroblast-mediated attenuation of drug efficacy via paracrine signaling

basicInfo.description: 3D reconstituted basement membrane (rBM) overlay culture of immortalized NF1 plexiform neurofibroma Schwann cell lines on growth factor-reduced Matrigel; used for phenotypic characterization, collagen IV proteolysis assays, and drug screening under conditions recapitulating in vivo tumor growth
basicInfo.synonyms: 3D rBM overlay model; three-dimensional overlay culture; reconstituted basement membrane model; pathomimetic 3D models
basicInfo.cultureMedia: DMEM/high glucose supplemented with 2% FBS and 2% rBM for 3D overlay cultures (reduced from 10% FBS used in 2D); 1% penicillin-streptomycin; imaging performed in phenol red-free DMEM with 2% FBS
basicInfo.developerAffiliation: Department of Pharmacology, Wayne State University School of Medicine

modelLimitations: Does not include multiple cell types in co-culture in the development model; lacks axonal component; slower PN growth in 3D may not fully reflect in vivo kinetics; uses immortalized cell lines rather than primary patient tissue
